metadata.verification: -O0 island (game_libs_mid.c set OPT_FLAGS:=-O0): all-args-spill + unfilled jal delays + b-to-epilogue. KEY UN-CAP: the 0xD150 data ref is the symbol-value form (lui 0x1; addiu -0x2EB0); referenced DIRECTLY as &D_0000D150 (DEFINED = 0x0000D150, real offset, not the collapsed D_00000000=0) so -O0 emits 2-insn %hi/%lo that resolves+bakes to the target. rv kept in s0 via register. fuzzy=100; clean +1 (1580->1581), no regression
